title: Castle Bake-off — Multi-model three.js
excerpt: Fable 5 · GPT 5.6 Sol · Kimi K3 · Grok 4.5 · Gemini 3.5 Flash · MiMo V2.5 Pro · MiniMax M3 · GLM 5.2 — low-poly, semi-realistic, very realistic.
content_html:
Multi-model bake-off

Medieval Castle Worlds

Same brief, three art directions, eight models. Each world is a single self-contained index.html — procedural three.js, no external assets.
